---
title: "main_code"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#Packages used

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(roxygen2)
library(usethis)
library(readxl)
library(leaflet)
library(janitor)

```

```{r}

# Reading the target .xlsx-file
herring_data <- read_excel("herring_data.xlsx")

# Choosing unique stations
stations <- herring_data %>%
  distinct(station_nr, lat, lon)

# Creating and plotting leaflet-map
leaflet(data = stations) %>%
  addTiles() %>%  # Base map
  addCircleMarkers(
    lng = ~lon,
    lat = ~lat,
    radius = 5,
    popup = ~paste("Station:", station_nr),
    color = "blue",
    fillOpacity = 0.8
  )


```

```{r}

# Read the Excel file
herring_data <- read_excel("herring_data.xlsx")%>%
  clean_names()

# Ensure relevant columns exist and remove missing values
plot_data <- herring_data %>%
  select(station_nr, ind_nr, len_mm) %>%
  filter(!is.na(len_mm))

# Create histogram with facet wrap by station
ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = len_mm)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 10, fill = "steelblue", color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~ station_nr) +
  labs(
    title = "Length Distribution of Herring by Station",
    x = "Length (mm)",
    y = "Frequency"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```
